About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker Dashboard Today's data shows two exceptional performers dominating the short-term momentum rankings. TNGX ranks #1 with a composite score of 97.7, driven by extraordinary 1-year returns of 865% and a 6-month return of 175%, while maintaining perfect SMA alignment across all key moving averages (30/50/100/200). The stock's ratio consistency is strong with 4 out of 5 ratio tests passing, and it outperforms SPY by 844% over the year, suggesting isolated strength rather than broad market participation. TYRA follows closely as a secondary play with 249% annual returns and 200% 6-month returns, also with perfect SMA positioning and strong 4-ratio passes. Both securities exhibit "clean" momentum signals and normal volatility, but TNGX's 865% 1-year return represents an extreme outlier that warrants scrutiny regarding whether such returns reflect sustainable momentum or concentrated risk factors (the weak correlations to major sectors support isolated strength rather than systematic factor drive).
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
